reviews.review_description: it was a youtuber slop game, and turned into lethal ape copy slop.

The game is Bad in my opinion shop is way to small and horror is like every horror game. I have a game coming out with the same name well it’s not illegal to have the same name because it’s called chimp chambers 2.0 well the owner is being aggressive to me about me apparently stealing the name which I didn’t I’ve had to name idea for over a year now. The game severs aren’t working properly. Rlly sucky game. I’ve honestly seen better horror games with low quality. Rlly expected more out of this game. I do not recommend this game
How can this be a Version 2 if it's the same game on App Lab? Seems you are trying to mislead people on the Chimp Chambers (with the copyright) to try and get this "New" version.

reviews.review_description: Very clean physics and it’s not laggy or anything, no performance issues whatsoever, W game

It’s a good game (plus I’m a tester in it). 
Also for the people saying it’s a copy of the other chimp chambers it’s not, technically the copied us when we were in V1 and used our name to mislead. and the V2 just came out not to long ago and some of you guys are saying it’s bad, so just came to clear the allegations. (Also this game has been out long before the other chimp chambers but it was just on side quest)
